verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will lift my eyes to the heavens Where my help comes from I run into Your courts To be near You, Lord I long to hear Your voice All that I desire is You alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will sing to You In the shelter of Your wings Surrounded by Your favor, Oh Lord I will sing You're my refuge I will sing You're my refuge

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Forever I will lift Your name on high For You are worthy
